meta.title: The CRITICAL FLAW with Modern Fighter Jets
meta.description:
Even though modern fighters cost upwards of $100 million there's still a secret flaw in them that hasn't been fixed. 

If you're an organization that would like to partner on a video, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

Every 100th person wins a PATCH  👉  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway

--

🎬 Produced and Written By: Hasard Lee, Michael Cunningham, Josh Hak, and Nicole Livering.

📷  Cam Ops: Shawn Cimonetti, Nicole Livering

👨🏻‍💻 Edited By: Michael Cunningham

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen


00:00 - Intro
00:58 - Modern Fighter's Big Problem
02:23 - Not a New Problem
03:02 - Not Good Enough
05:15 - The Expert Opinion
07:22 - The F-35's Critical Flaw
08:12 - The Savior Arrives
09:00 - How It Works
11:19 - Hasard Tries the Skydrate System
13:11 - Conclusion
